title: Roundtable Rolling State
description: Validates the rolling state object maintained in-memory per roundtable session. Updated by trailer + marker extractor with trailer-wins conflict resolution (AC-003-03). Not persisted; meta.json remains the persistent progress handle. Traces: FR-003, AC-003-01 through AC-003-04.

coverage_by_topic.description: Topic coverage tracking keyed by topic name, with coverage level or boolean per topic

additionalProperties.description: Coverage status for a topic (true/false, percentage, or label)

scan_complete.description: Whether the deferred codebase scan sub-task has completed

scope_accepted.description: Whether the user has accepted the overall scope framing

current_persona_rotation.description: Ordered list of persona IDs in the current rotation (e.g., ['maya', 'alex', 'jordan'])

rendering_mode.description: Current active rendering mode for LLM output formatting

amendment_cycles.description: Number of amendment cycles completed in the current session

participation_markers.description: Tracks which personas have participated in the current conversation phase

sub_task_completion.description: Completion status keyed by sub-task ID

additionalProperties.description: Completion status: true/false, or object with detailed completion info
